# Gcore Edge AI

> Deploy AI inference and GPU-accelerated training using Gcore Edge AI products - Everywhere Inference for model serving and GPU Cloud for Bare Metal and Virtual Machine compute.

- [Edge AI](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai.md): Deploy AI inference and GPU-accelerated training using Gcore Edge AI products - Everywhere Inference for model serving and GPU Cloud for Bare Metal and Virtual Machine compute.
- [Getting started](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/getting-started.md): Deploy AI models for inference using Gcore Everywhere Inference via Customer Portal or API, or create GPU clusters for model training with Gcore GPU Cloud and bare-metal infrastructure.
- [Billing](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/billing.md): Configure billing for Gcore GPU Virtual Machines and Bare Metal instances charged by resource type and configuration, and Everywhere Inference resources billed per minute of compute time with monthly fee processing and service suspension on payment failure.

## GPU cloud
- [About GPU Cloud](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/about-gpu-cloud.md): Deploy GPU clusters with Bare Metal GPU, Spot Bare Metal GPU, or Virtual GPU instance types, configured with NVIDIA H200, H100, A100, or L40S GPUs, InfiniBand or Ethernet interconnect, and NVMe storage for distributed LLM training, inference, and HPC workloads.
- [Create a Virtual GPU cluster](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/create-a-virtual-gpu-cluster.md): Create Virtual GPU clusters with configurable node count, GPU models, flavors, network boot disks, local data disks, optional network data disks, file share integration, and InfiniBand networking in Gcore GPU Cloud.
- [Manage a Virtual GPU cluster](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/manage-a-virtual-gpu-cluster.md): Manage Virtual GPU cluster nodes, power state, volumes, and network interfaces via cluster details page tabs including Overview, Volumes, Networking, Power, Tags, and Delete operations.
- [Create a Bare Metal GPU cluster](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/create-a-bare-metal-gpu-cluster.md): Create Bare Metal GPU clusters with dedicated physical servers, selecting region, GPU model, cluster type (Bare Metal GPU or Spot Bare Metal GPU), node count, and InfiniBand networking via Gcore Customer Portal GPU Cloud interface.
- [Manage a Bare Metal GPU cluster](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/manage-a-bare-metal-gpu-cluster.md): Manage Bare Metal GPU cluster nodes, resize instance count, configure power states, network interfaces, and delete individual nodes or entire clusters via the Gcore Customer Portal cluster details page.
- [Spot Bare Metal GPU](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/ai-infrastructure/spot-bare-metal-gpu.md): Deploy Spot Bare Metal GPU clusters with discounted pricing for interruptible workloads like batch processing and testing, understanding reclamation with 24-hour notice, data persistence on file shares and object storage, and availability by region.

## Everywhere inference
- [About Everywhere Inference](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference.md): Deploy trained AI models on Gcore Everywhere Inference edge nodes using Anycast endpoints and Smart Routing to achieve ultra-low latency inference across global regions with automatic failover via Healthchecks.
- [Everywhere Inference overview](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/overview.md): Deploy trained AI models on edge inference nodes using Everywhere Inference with anycast endpoints, smart routing, and serverless GPU infrastructure for low-latency inference across global regions.

## AI models
- [Prepare a custom AI model for deployment](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/ai-models/prepare-a-custom-ai-model-for-deployment.md): Prepare custom AI models for deployment by containerizing with vLLM or Diffusers, optimizing via quantization and pruning, building Docker images from Hugging Face models, and pushing to a container registry for inference serving.
- [Deploy an AI model](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/ai-models/deploy-an-ai-model.md): Deploy foundational open-source models or custom Docker container images to Gcore Everywhere Inference via the Deployments portal, specifying model catalog selection, image URL, Docker tag, container port, startup commands, and private registry credentials.
- [Manage AI model deployments](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/ai-models/manage-ai-model-deployments.md): Manage AI model deployments in Everywhere Inference by viewing deployment status, endpoint URLs, replica locations, and last status messages; start, stop, or delete deployments via action menu; modify Pod configuration hardware (Processor type, VM Flavor), autoscaling settings (Cooldown period, Pod lifetime), and environment variables in the Settings tab.

## Container image registries
- [Manage container image registries](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/container-image-registries/manage-registries.md): Manage container image registries in Gcore Everywhere Inference by viewing registry names and URLs, editing authentication credentials, and deleting registries via the Customer Portal Registries interface.
- [Add a container image registry](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/container-image-registries/add-a-registry.md): Add custom private and public container image registries to Everywhere Inference by configuring registry name, URL, username, and password in the Gcore Customer Portal, supporting Docker Hub, Huggingface, and other registry services for AI model deployments.

## API keys
- [Create an inference deployment with authorization](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/api-keys/create-inference-deployment-with-auth.md): Create an inference deployment with authorization enabled by setting the authorization option during deployment, then retrieve the auto-generated API Key via the Gcore Inference API endpoint and include it in the Authorization header for all subsequent API requests.

## Quotas
- [Request account quota increase](https://gcore.com/docs/edge-ai/everywhere-inference/quotas/request-quota-increase.md): Request quota increase for Everywhere Inference deployments by specifying deployment count, millicores (vCPU), and GPU resource limits (L40S, H100) in the Account Quotas dialog via Gcore Customer Portal.
